sections.title: Without wearing a m'speak amulet or having Monkey Madness II completed

lines.speaker: Monkey
lines.text: Ukkuk oook! Eeek aka, ahh aka gonk.

sections.title: Whilst wearing a m'speak amulet or having Monkey Madness II completed

lines.speaker: Monkey
lines.text: Who's an ugly human? Give me a banana!

lines.speaker: Monkey
lines.text: Stupid human! Give monkey a banana!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry monkey, I don't have any bananas.

lines.speaker: Monkey
lines.text: Aghhh. You're a rubbish human, get monkey a banana now.

lines.speaker: Monkey
lines.text: Ha ha! Smelly human gave monkey a banana.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow you're one nasty piece of work. Have you ever heard of gratitude?

lines.speaker: Monkey
lines.text: Hey baldy, give monkey another banana!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just because I'm not covered in fur doesn't make me bald, you cheeky monkey.

lines.speaker: Monkey
lines.text: Monkey wants another banana now! Give me, give me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Look I've had it with you, you little degenerate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll not give you a banana until you learn manners.
